# Synthetic Yuraive fixtures

These files were created for this repository's tests. They do not contain real
media or third-party material and may be redistributed with the Yuraive AI tools.
The files with media extensions are intentionally tiny path-existence markers;
the inspection tool does not decode media contents.

`valid/` is a complete, internally consistent Yuraive v1 content directory.
`broken-references/` intentionally contains duplicate IDs, missing references,
unsafe paths, unreachable nodes, and dead ends.
